overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person perspective walking along a sunny coastal boardwalk in a futuristic city. The player ascends stairs to an upper plaza, approaches a colorful psychedelic van and an NPC with a mohawk, and enters the vehicle. The scene features bright morning sunlight, palm trees, and cyberpunk architecture against a clear blue sky.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny coastal boardwalk with wooden decking and palm trees. The camera moves forward past an outdoor shower fixture, approaching a wide concrete staircase. The bright morning sun casts long shadows across the planks as the player begins ascending the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with empty swimming pool

events.description: emerges from stairwell onto open upper plaza with pool area

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward a colorful parked van in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs onto an open concrete plaza, the scene reveals an empty swimming pool to the right and a colorful psychedelic van parked in the distance. A pedestrian walks ahead toward the van area as the camera continues forward across the sunlit plaza.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a muscular NPC with a distinctive mohawk standing beside the colorful van. After passing close by the character, the camera moves around to the driver's side door, with the ocean visible in the background beyond the boardwalk.

events.description: enters the van, transitioning from exterior plaza to interior cabin view

agents.ego_description: entering the driver's seat of the van, viewing the interior dashboard and controls

entered.detail: futuristic vehicle dashboard with digital displays and controls
tan steering wheel with control buttons and logo
tan leather driver's seat with visible stitching

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the van, revealing the interior cabin with a tan leather driver's seat and futuristic dashboard. Through the windows, the plaza and distant buildings remain visible as the perspective settles into the driver's seat.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sunny coastal boardwalk up into the interior of a psychedelic vehicle. It begins by moving across wooden decking past palm trees and an outdoor shower, ascending a wide concrete staircase as the morning sun casts long shadows. As the camera emerges onto an open concrete plaza, the view expands to reveal an empty swimming pool and a colorful van parked in the distance. The perspective then closes in on a muscular NPC with a mohawk standing by the vehicle, gliding past him toward the driver's side door with the ocean visible in the background. Finally, the camera transitions from the bright outdoor light into the van's cabin, settling into a tan leather driver's seat facing a futuristic dashboard.
